title: OpenRouter Fusion: They OFFICIALLY CLAIM THAT THIS MODEL beats FABLE?
summary: AICodeKing reviews OpenRouter's Fusion API, which combines multiple models through a judge to claim Fable-level performance at half the cost. Testing reveals the marketing claims are misleading: while Fusion performs well on Deep Research benchmarks, it underperforms on practical tasks like coding, math, and SVG generation, often costing more and responding slower than single strong models.
writeup: AICodeKing reviews OpenRouter's Fusion API, which routes a prompt through multiple models and uses a judge to select an answer, with the official claim of matching Fable-level performance at half the cost. Testing contradicts the marketing: Fusion does well on Deep Research benchmarks but underperforms on practical tasks including coding, math, and SVG generation. In those cases it often costs more and responds slower than a single strong model, undercutting the cost and quality pitch.
